title: europes Kitchen
description: every country 5 foods (not all country's yet)
body:
Europe’s Kitchen – A Minecraft Culinary Expansion
Europe’s Kitchen is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of European-inspired foods to enhance your in-game culinary experience. This mod adds five unique food items from every European country, allowing players to discover and craft regional dishes using Minecraft’s survival and cooking mechanics.

Features:
- Authentic European Dishes – Craft a selection of foods from different European countries, each with unique ingredients and recipes.

- New Ingredients – Gather region-specific ingredients to prepare traditional meals.

- Cooking Equipment – Utilize specialized tools and crafting methods to create your favorite European-inspired dishes.

- Expanded Food Variety – Enjoy an enriched food system that adds depth to survival gameplay.

This mod is designed for players who enjoy food-related gameplay enhancements and want to explore diverse culinary traditions in Minecraft. Enjoy crafting and tasting Europe’s finest meals as you expand your Minecraft world’s cuisine! (the current country's in the mod are: The Netherlands (6 instead of 5 Dishes), Belgium, Luxembourg, Germany, Italy (6 instead of 5 Dishes), France, Spain, Portugal, United Kingdom, Monaco, Vatican City, Romania, Moldova and bulgaria)
